ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term of the loan (e.g., 36 months, 60 months) */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status of the borrower (e.g., MORTGAGE, OWN, RENT) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the loan (e.g., A, B, C, D, E, F) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., debt_consolidation, credit_card, car, etc.) */,
  "int_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "installment" REAL /* Monthly installment amount */,
  "addr_state" TEXT /* State of residence of the borrower */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Status of the loan (e.g., Current, Late, Default) */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of loan application (e.g., Individual, Joint) */,
  "loan_amnt" INTEGER /* Loan amount */,
  "emp_length" TEXT /* Employment length of the borrower (e.g., 10+ years, < 1 year, etc.) */,
  "annual_inc" INTEGER /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "dti" REAL /* Debt-to-income ratio of the borrower */,
  "delinq_2yrs" INTEGER /* Number of delinquencies in the last 2 years */,
  "revol_bal" INTEGER /* Revolving balance */,
  "revol_util" REAL /* Revolving utilization */,
  "total_acc" INTEGER /* Total accounts */,
  "num_tl_90g_dpd_24m" INTEGER /* Number of late payments in the last 24 months */,
  "dti_joint" REAL /* Debt-to-income ratio of the borrower (joint) */,
  "bad_loan" INTEGER /* Whether the loan is bad (1) or not (0) */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, mortgage, car, etc.) */,
  "collateral_required" INTEGER /* Whether collateral is required for the loan */,
  "insurance_required" INTEGER /* Whether insurance is required for the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the borrower */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the borrower */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the borrower */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence of the borrower */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of residence of the borrower */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the borrower */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the borrower */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowers_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_history" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit history record */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borrower associated with the credit history */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "credit_inquiries" INTEGER /* Number of credit inquiries */,
  "credit_accounts" INTEGER /* Number of credit accounts */,
  "credit_account_open_date" TEXT /* Date the credit account was opened */,
  "credit_account_close_date" TEXT /* Date the credit account was closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_history_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan performance record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the performance data */,
  "payment_history" TEXT /* Payment history of the loan (e.g., on-time, late, missed) */,
  "late_payments" INTEGER /* Number of late payments */,
  "default_status" TEXT /* Default status of the loan (e.g., Current, Late, Default) */,
  "default_date" TEXT /* Date the loan went into default */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_performance_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the risk assessment */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score of the loan (e.g., 0-100) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the loan (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "risk_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the risk assessment was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the loan officer (e.g., Mortgage, Personal Loans, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan decision */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the decision */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer who made the decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_status" TEXT /* Status of the decision (e.g., Approved, Denied, Pending) */,
  "approval_amount" INTEGER /* Approved loan amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_decisions_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_decisions_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment schedule */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the payment schedule */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment is due */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., direct debit, online payment, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_schedules_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collateral" (
  "collateral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collateral record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the collateral */,
  "collateral_type" TEXT /* Type of collateral (e.g., vehicle, property, etc.) */,
  "collateral_value" REAL /* Value of the collateral */,
  "collateral_description" TEXT /* Description of the collateral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collateral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collateral_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the insurance */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., life, disability, etc.) */,
  "insurance_premium" REAL /* Premium amount of the insurance */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan associated with the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., payment history, credit report, etc.) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, etc.) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, loan officer, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, mortgage, car, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)
